urgent.gentle: Your Kamino loan needs attention now

warning.gentle: Your Kamino loan deserves a look
warning.encouraging: Time to check your Kamino loan

urgent.gentle: Your loan's Health Factor is at {{hf}} — this means your collateral is very close to being liquidated (sold automatically). Margin: {{margin}}%. Adding collateral can help.
urgent.encouraging: HF at {{hf}} and margin at {{margin}}%. It's tight, but you can fix it! Add collateral or pay down some debt on Kamino.
urgent.direct: HF: {{hf}}. Margin: {{margin}}%. Liquidation risk. Action needed on Kamino.
urgent.technical: HF: {{hf}}. Margin: {{margin}}%. LTV near limit. Deposit collateral or partial repay.

warning.gentle: Your loan's Health Factor is at {{hf}} — not critical, but worth keeping an eye on. Margin at {{margin}}%.
warning.encouraging: HF at {{hf}} with {{margin}}% margin. Good time to strengthen your position on Kamino!
warning.technical: HF: {{hf}}. Margin: {{margin}}%. LTV rising. Monitoring recommended.

body.gentle: Your Nudge Score went from {{previous}} to {{current}}. It happens — let's see how to improve?
body.encouraging: Score went from {{previous}} to {{current}}. Don't worry! Check the recommended actions to bounce back.

title.gentle: Too much of your money is in 1 coin

body.gentle: {{symbol}} represents {{percent}}% of your portfolio. Having everything in one place is risky — diversifying protects your money.
body.encouraging: {{symbol}} is at {{percent}}% of your portfolio. How about spreading it out? More coins = more protection!
body.direct: {{symbol}} at {{percent}}% of portfolio. Excessive exposure. Consider diversifying.
body.technical: {{symbol}}: {{percent}}% of portfolio. Elevated concentration risk. Rebalancing suggested.

up.gentle: SOL's price went up {{percent}}% since your last visit. Good time to review your position.
up.encouraging: SOL is up {{percent}}%! This may affect your portfolio — worth a look.
up.direct: SOL up {{percent}}%. Review impact on portfolio and loans.
up.technical: SOL +{{percent}}%. Evaluate impact on LTV and collateral if applicable.

down.gentle: SOL's price dropped {{percent}}% since your last visit. No panic — let's see how you're doing.
down.encouraging: SOL pulled back {{percent}}%. Part of the market! Check if you need to adjust any positions.
down.direct: SOL down {{percent}}%. Check impact on positions.
down.technical: SOL -{{percent}}%. Check impact on collateral and HF if applicable.

body.gentle: Another step done on your journey! You're on step {{completed}} of {{total}}. Keep going at your pace.
body.encouraging: Congrats! Step {{completed}} of {{total}} completed! Every step counts. On to the next?

body.gentle: It's been {{days}} days since you visited your dashboard. Your portfolio may have changed — shall we take a look?
body.encouraging: It's been {{days}} days! A lot can change in the market. How about checking on your portfolio?
body.direct: {{days}} days without access. Review your portfolio and positions.
body.technical: Last access: {{days}} days ago. Data outdated. Update recommended.

body.gentle: Your Nudge Score went from {{previous}} to {{current}}. Great job — your decisions are making a difference!
body.encouraging: Score from {{previous}} to {{current}}! You're growing! Keep it up and the results will show.
